question:
Assume that a company has a class named Employee which contains information about employees. The class contains a private integer variable named empId which stores the unique employee ID of each employee:

Which statement is true about accessing and modifying the empId variable of an Employee object from outside the Employee class? Select the correct option from the given choices.
options: The empId variable can be accessed and modified using getter and setter methods, respectively.
The empId variable can be modified but not accessed.
The empId variable cannot be accessed or modified from outside the Employee class.
The empId variable can be accessed but not modified.
